service.description: Exports Moqui MCP screen documentation and prompts into a JSONL dataset suitable for fine-tuning LLMs (like Qwen2.5-Coder) on Moqui-specific tasks.

parameter.name: renderAria
parameter.description: If true, renders the ARIA tree for each screen to use as 'input' context. Note: Requires a running server context.

service.description: Tests the connection to the configured LLM and verifies it can respond to a simple Moqui-themed prompt.
